titleStmt.title: SII 15.106: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 106. (B.K. No. 135 of 1926-27.) HUYILGŌḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the house of a village menial named Durga.

This is dated Śaka 1087, Tāraṇa, Pushya-amavāsye, Monday, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti. The Śaka year 1087 (expired) corresponds to Pārthiva during which year the given details correspond to 1166 A.D., January 3. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, however, occurred on 1165 A.D., December 25. But, if the Śaka year is current agreeing with Tāraṇa, the said tithi corresponds to 1165 A.D., January 14. The weekday, however, would be Thursday and the Samkrānti occurred on 1164 A.D., December 25.

It records a gift to the god Chaṇḍēśvara of Hūligoḷa by the Sixteen representatives of the Eight Nāḍus, of the Ayyāvoḷe community of merchants, the Prabhus of Beḷvala. Three Hundred, Kisukāḍu Seventy and Bāgaḍage Seventy, and the MuMmuridaṇḍas and Nānādēs11is, who had all gathered in an assembly. Hūligoḷais described as an agrahāra and the foremost trading centre of the south.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

ḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
© svasti samasta bhuvanavikhyātapadaṁ śatavīrasāsanalabdhānēka
guṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita satyasaucācāra cāritranayavina
ya vijñāna vīrabaṇaṁjadha¨rmma pratipāḷaka visuddha guḍḍadhvaja virāji
tānantasāhasa vīralakṣmīliṁgita viśāla vakṣasthaḷabhu
vanaparākramōnnataruṁ vāsudēva khaṁḍaḷīmūḷa bhadravaṁ
śōdbhavaruṁ bhagavatīdēvīlabdha varaprasādaruṁ Ayyūvoḷeya pu
ravarādhīśvararappa śrīmadeṁṭunāḍa padinaṟuvaruṁ beḷvalamū
nūṟaṟa kiskāḍeḷpattaṟa bāgaḍage yeḷpattaṟa paṭṭaṇa
daprabhugaḷumiṁtanitugrāmūnugrāmaṁgaḷa taḷa sa
maste muṁmuridaṁḍa nānādēsiyuṁ śrīmadagrahāra kaiyyū
voḷeyalmahānāḍāgi neredi¨rddu śrīmadegrahāraṁ teṁkaṇa baḷaṁja
dādivaṭṭaṇa śrī hūligoḷa caṁḍēsvaradēva¨rgge biṭṭa yara dha
¨rmmakramaveṁteṁdaḍe . bhujabaḷamalla vīrabijjaṇa dēvakālada 1087 ne
ya tāraṇa saṁvatsarada puṣyadamānāsa sōmavāraduttarā
yaṇa saṁkrānti byatīpātadaṁdu . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyā
nadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇa japasemādhi sīlaguṇa saṁ
pannaru śrī mūlasthānadēvalabdha varaprasādarēkavākyaru śaraṇāgata
vajrapaṁjararappa Ūroḍeya pramukhavaśēśa mahājanaṁ
nūṟi¨rppadiṁbara sannidhānadalu mahānāḍāgi śrīgavaṟēsvara dēva
poṁge vīsavaṁ biṭṭaru Iṁtī dha¨rmmamaṁ nū
muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷu pratipāḷisuva
pratipāḷisi naḍasidava¨rgge vāraṇāsiyalu sā
kavileyaṁ vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa phalaṁ Īdha¨rmmava
damaged
Digital edition of SII 15.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
